# Marcel Pouget Designs

Marcel Pouget is a designer and photographer based in Austria, offering custom print design, web design, and professional photography.

## Core Navigation
- [Home](https://pougetdesigns.com/)
- [Leistungen](https://pougetdesigns.com/leistungen)
- [Portfolio](https://pougetdesigns.com/portfolio)
- [Über Mich](https://pougetdesigns.com/about)
- [Kontakt](https://pougetdesigns.com/kontakt)

## Case Studies
- [Askalaps IoT](https://pougetdesigns.com/portfolio/askalaps-iot)
- [Smart EV-Charging System](https://pougetdesigns.com/portfolio/diplomarbeit-lademanager)
- [Harfenbau Reschenhofer](https://pougetdesigns.com/portfolio/harfenbau-reschenhofer)
- [Makani Bowls](https://pougetdesigns.com/portfolio/makani-bowls)
